violations.text: Chocolate chip cookies packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quaternary sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
